case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN VS. DONALD BROOKS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-06-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPY OF SC-100 MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED UNSERVED WITH NOTE FROM A PERSON STATING THAT MR. BROOKS DOES NOT LIVE AT THAT ADDRESS. NO POSTAL SERVICE INFORMATION AVAILABLE AS ITEM WAS NOT RETURNED IN THE ORIGINAL ENVELOPE.
